title: MC-DaClassroom
description: A modpack with over 300 mods originally made for DaClassroom, a private online server, designed for exploration, adventure, and multiplayer fun. Enjoy revamped structures, enhanced visuals, realistic world generation, and more!
body:
# Overview
> This modpack offers a refined vanilla+ experience, blending performance-friendly optimizations with immersive upgrades and quality-of-life enhancements. From realistic soundscapes and dynamic weather to visually stunning world generation and smarter villagers, the pack is designed for players who want a richer Minecraft world without sacrificing the core gameplay. You’ll find intuitive tweaks to combat, building, inventory, exploration, and survival—all supported by powerful performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, and Distant Horizons. Whether you're customizing armor trims, diving into better dungeons and taverns, or sailing small ships across epic terrain, every mod adds depth and polish. Below is a fully organized and detailed list of all included mods, categorized for easy reference.

## World & Environment Enhancement
### Atmosphere & Immersion
- AmbientSounds – Dynamic environmental soundscapes that change with weather, biome, and time.
- Sound Physics Remastered – Realistic sound propagation, occlusion, and reverb.
- Cool Rain – Rain has improved visual and atmospheric effects.
- Fire Rekindled – Reworks fire visuals and adds more intense flame effects.
- Rain Should Extinguish Campfires – Rain puts out lit campfires, adding realism.
- Enhanced Audio: Ambience (Sound Pack) – Cinematic environmental audio that enhances immersion.
- Drip Sounds – Adds realistic water dripping in caves and wet areas.

### Visual & Biome Details
- Falling Leaves – Trees naturally shed leaves for seasonal realism.
- Flower Clusters – More vibrant and dense floral arrangements.
- Better Trees – More natural tree shapes and fuller canopies.
- Better Lily Pads – Improved models and visuals for lily pads.
- Diagonal Fences / Windows / Rails / Perfect Rails – Allows diagonal placement for architectural freedom.

## World Generation & Structures
### YUNG’s Better Structures
- YUNG’s Better Desert Temples
- YUNG’s Better Jungle Temples
- YUNG’s Better Ocean Monuments
- YUNG’s Better Witch Huts
- YUNG’s Better Strongholds
- YUNG’s API – Required backend for YUNG’s structures

### New Places to Explore
- Dungeons and Taverns / End Castle Standalone – Adds medieval fantasy structures filled with loot and lore.
- Towns and Towers – Random towers, bridges, and towns for exploration.
- Effortless Structure – Simplifies custom structure placement.
- Village Spawn Point – World starts in a village.
- Epic Terrain – Adds dynamic, realistic terrain generation.

## Player Enhancements
### Inventory & Equipment
- Sophisticated Backpacks + Core – Modular backpacks with upgrades and automation.
- Elytra Slot – Dedicated Elytra slot to wear armor and glide.
- Easy Anvils / Fixed Anvil Repair Cost / Easy Magic – Reduces enchantment and repair frustrations.
- Universal Enchants – Allows broader enchantment compatibility.
- Bow Infinity Fix – Makes Infinity work with one arrow again.
- TieredZ – Adds gear progression visually and mechanically.
- Animal Armor Trims – Customizable armor trims for pets.
- Horse Buff / Horse Armor Stand / Horse Stonks – Horse upgrades, display, and trade integration.

### Cosmetics & Animations
- Serious Player Animations – Realistic and smooth animations for players.
- Eating Animation – Adds eating animations for immersion.
- Chat Animation – Player mouths move when chatting.
- TrimsEffects / Visual: Armor Trims – Special effects for armor trims.
- Status Effect Bars – Adds visual potion effect bars.

## Villagers, Mobs & NPC Life
### Villager Upgrades
- Villager Hats – Villagers wear profession-specific hats.
- Villager Names – Randomized names for immersion.
- Infinite Trading – Removes vanilla trade limits.
- Wandering Trader May Leave – Trader disappears over time.

### Wildlife Tweaks
- Nyf's Spiders – Enhanced spider animations and models.
- Creeper Overhaul – Biome-specific creepers with unique designs.
- Skeleton Horse Spawn – Increases chance of skeleton horses.
- Despawning Eggs Hatch – Eggs still hatch after despawning.
- Pet Names – Easily name pets.

## Building & Decoration
### Blocks & Items
- Diagonal Windows / Fences / Rails – Allows creative block placement.
- Borderless Glass – Seamless glass with no hard edges.
- New Slab Variants / Enchanted Vertical Slabs – More slab options with magical styles.
- Mo Glass – Adds new decorative glass blocks.
- Softer Hay Bales – More visually pleasing hay bales.
- Colourful Containers / Dark Mode – Custom GUIs for containers.

## Utility & Core Mods
### Performance & Engine
- Sodium / Reese's Sodium Options
- Lithium
- FerriteCore
- Distant Horizons – Level of Detail rendering for distant terrain.
- Iris Shaders – Shader support for modern Minecraft.
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine – Faster chunk loading.

### Libraries & APIs
- Fabric API
- Architectury
- SuperMartijn642’s Core Lib / Config Lib
- Cardinal Components API
- JamLib
- LibZ
- YUNG’s API
- esourceful Lib / Config
- FokusAPI
- Forge Config API Port
- Cristel Lib
- YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)

## Gameplay Tweaks & Quality of Life
### Crafting & Survival
- Quick Cure – Instantly cure effects with splash potions.
- Universal Bone Meal – Bonemeal works on more plants.
- Smelt Diorite to Calcite – Turns excess blocks into calcite.
- Ore Harvester – Efficient mining of ore veins.
- Replanting Crops – Automatically replants after harvest.
- Cut Through – Lets swords cut leaves and plants quickly.

### Inventory & UI
- Mouse Tweaks – Drag-click for easier item moving.
- Stack Refill – Replaces used-up hotbar items.
- Enchant Icons – Shows enchantments as icons in tooltips.
- Better Mount HUD – Displays mount stats on screen.

## Miscellaneous Mods
- Auditory Continued – Enhances block sounds and ambiance.
- Artisan’s Armory | Equipment Overhaul – Adds new gear and armor materials.
- Shulker Drops Two – Guarantees two shulker shells.
- Small Ships – Adds fully functional, sail-able ships.
- World Weaver – Smooths out biome transitions and terrain.
- Amber – Adds a new gemstone.
- M.R.U – Unknown magic/resource system.
- Scribble – In-world writing system.
- BetterNether / BetterEnd – Expands Nether and End with biomes, mobs, and blocks.
- NiftyCarts – Upgrades minecarts.
- Carry On – Pick up blocks and mobs by hand.
- Blossom Blade – Magical or aesthetic weapon addition.
- Visuality / Particular / Particle Rain – Adds new visual effects and particles.
- Watch of Undying – Custom totem of undying appearance.
- Too Fast – Speeds up movement or actions Combating Server Rubberbanding.
- Accessible Step – Smooth auto-step-up movement.
